title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bandhan Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bandhan Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bandhan Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bandhan Bank:
Bandhan Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bandhan Bank!
